name: GERI'S- malate bayview mansion comfort studio
about: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers free Wi-Fi in all rooms. Conveniently situated in the Malate part of Manila, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Don't leave before paying a visit to the famous Intramuros. Rated with 3 stars, this high-quality property provides guests with access to fitness center and outdoor pool on-site.
